21 September 2025 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Trump Threatens Afghanistan If Bagram Air Base Not Handed Back To US RFE/RL 21 Sep 2025 -- US President Donald Trump threatened Afghanistan with unspecified "bad things" if it doesn't turn Bagram Airfield back to the United States, an action previously rejected by the country's Taliban rulers.

  • UN Security Council to Convene Emergency Meeting Following Violation of Estonian Airspace Estonia MFA 21 Sep 2025 -- On September 22, at 10:00 AM New York time (5:00 PM Estonian time), the United Nations Security Council will convene an emergency meeting in response to Russia's brazen violation of Estonian airspace last Friday. This marks the first time in Estonia's 34 years of UN membership that the country has formally requested an emergency meeting of the Security Council.
  • Secretary General Vseviov: In the future, Russia must consider the possibility that fighter jets violating airspace will be shot down Estonia MFA 21 Sep 2025 -- Foreign Minister Margus Tsahkna said yesterday, 19 September, during a meeting in Stockholm with his Swedish counterpart Maria Malmer Stenergard, that Russia's brazen violation of Estonia's airspace demonstrates how Moscow is increasingly testing boundaries, and it underlines the need to collectively intensify pressure on Russia.
  • Latvia expresses a categorical protest to Russia over the violation of Estonia's airspace Latvia MFA 21 Sep 2025 -- Today, on 21 September 2025, in solidarity with Estonia, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Latvia summoned the Chargé d'Affaires of the Russian Embassy in Latvia to deliver them a note and lodge a categorical protest concerning incursion by the Russian fighter aircraft into the airspace of Estonia on 19 September.

  • INDIAN NAVY STRENGTHENS TIES WITH MOZAMBIQUE NAVY DURING PORT CALL OF FIRST TRAINING SQUADRON AT MAPUTO India PIB 21 Sep 2025 -- In a demonstration of enduring maritime friendship, the Indian Navy's First Training Squadron (1TS) comprising INS Tir, INS Shardul, INS Sujata, and ICGS Sarathi concluded its four-day port visit to Maputo, Mozambique from 16-19 Sep 2025
  • Third Edition of Dweep Diksha Dialogue underscores ANC's Role as a Maritime Strategic Hub India PIB 21 Sep 2025 -- The Andaman and Nicobar Command (ANC), India's only operational Joint Services Command, successfully hosted the third edition of the Dweep Diksha Dialogue on September 19-20, 2025 at Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman and Nicobar (A&N) Islands, under the theme 'Evolution of ANC as a Strategic Hub and Beyond

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • PM Netanyahu's remarks at the opening of the government meeting Israel - Prime Minister 18 Sep 2025
  • Israel categorically rejects the one-sided declaration of the recognition of a Palestinian state Israel MFA 21 Sep 2025 -- This move goes against all logic of negotiation and reaching a compromise between two sides, and it will push the desired peace further away.
  • Statement by PM Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 21 Sep 2025 -- Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu: "There will be no Palestinian state. The response to the latest attempt to force upon us a terror state in the heart of our land will be given after my return from the United States"

  • What to know ahead of the UN summit on the Question of Palestine UN News 21 Sep 2025 -- After nearly two years of war in Gaza, the suffering of its residents shows no sign of easing. As Israel launches a major ground offensive in the north of the enclave, attention once again turns to the United Nations.

  • Chairman Mast Statement on Australia, Canada, U.K. Recognizing 'State of Palestine' U.S. House of Representatives Committee on Foreign Affairs 21 Sep 2025

  • Australia recognises the state of Palestine Prime Minister of Australia 21 Sep 2025 -- Effective today, Sunday the 21st of September 2025, the Commonwealth of Australia formally recognises the independent and sovereign State of Palestine.
  • Press conference - United Nations headquarters, New York Prime Minister of Australia 21 Sep 2025
  • Statement by Prime Minister Carney on Canada's recognition of the State of Palestine Prime Minister of Canada 21 Sep 2025 -- "Since 1947, it has been the policy of every Canadian government to support a two-state solution for lasting peace in the Middle East. This envisioned the creation of a sovereign, democratic, and viable State of Palestine building its future in peace and security alongside the State of Israel.
  • OIC Secretary-General Welcomes Recognition of the State of Palestine by the UK, Canada, and Australia Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 21 Sep 2025 -- The Secretary-General of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC), H.E. Hissein Brahim Taha, welcomed the decision by the United Kingdom, Canada, and Australia to recognize the State of Palestine.
  • Aboul Gheit welcomes recognition of Palestinian State by Britain, Canada, Australia, and Portugal League of Arab States 21 Sep 2025 -- Mr. Ahmed Aboul Gheit, Secretary-General of the League of Arab States, welcomed the recognition of the Palestinian State by Britain, Canada, Australia, and Portugal, describing these recognitions as "historic" and stressing that they open a serious path towards a peaceful settlement of the Palestinian-Israeli conflict on the basis of the two-state solution.
  • UK formally recognises Palestinian State UK FCDO 21 Sep 2025 -- The UK has formally recognised Palestine to protect the viability of a two-state solution and create a path towards lasting peace for the Israeli and Palestinian people.
  • PM statement on the recognition of Palestine: 21 September 2025 Gov.UK 21 Sep 2025

    • Other Conflicts

  • 'Warring world crying out for peace' says UN chief as leaders gather in New York UN News 21 Sep 2025 -- UN Secretary-General António Guterres marked the International Day of Peace on Sunday with a stark warning that "our warring world is crying out for peace," urging people everywhere to act now to silence guns, heal divisions and build hope.

  • On 20 September 2025, Security Forces conducted an intelligence based operation in general area Kulachi, Dera Ismail Khan District, on reported presence of Khwarij belonging to Indian Proxy, Fitna al Khwarij. ISPR Pakistan 21 Sep 2025

  • At least 11 children reportedly killed in attack on a mosque in Sudan's North Darfur State UNICEF 21 Sep 2025
  • UN chief sounds alarm over worsening crisis in Sudan's El Fasher UN News 21 Sep 2025 -- The UN Secretary-General on Saturday voiced grave alarm at the rapidly deteriorating situation in El Fasher, the capital of North Darfur, warning of mounting risks to civilians trapped in the besieged city.

News Reports

  • READOUT: Ranking Member Smith Leads Bipartisan CODEL to China - September 21 House Armed Services Committee - Democrats 21 Sep 2025

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 21 Sep 2025

  • English rendering of PM's address to the Nation India PIB 21 Sep 2025

  • Prime Minister Carney meets with President of Namibia Netumbo Nandi-Ndaitwah Prime Minister of Canada 21 Sep 2025
  • Prime Minister Carney meets with Secretary-General of the United Nations António Guterres Prime Minister of Canada 21 Sep 2025
  • Secretary Rubio's Call with Canadian Foreign Minister Anand US Dept. of State 21 Sep 2025

  • UN, AU and EU leaders pledge joint push for peace and development in Africa UN News 21 Sep 2025 -- The United Nations, African Union (AU) and European Union (EU) have reaffirmed their commitment to peace and sustainable development in Africa, pledging deeper cooperation to end conflicts, support stability and tackle global challenges from debt to climate change.
